acceptance_targets: [ch13-craft-001] PASS if the revised exchange between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:129 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:155 puts at least two concrete past incidents or money facts on the page and Lena's rebuttal answers those specifics; FAIL if June still makes the scene land mainly through generalized claims about what 'people' do.

[ch13-award-001] PASS if the revised note at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:279 contains no more than one direct lexical lift from June's earlier lines and Lena can still plausibly hear June inside it by snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:287 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:289; FAIL if the beat still depends on multiple identical callbacks in a single nineteen-second note.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised exchange between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:129 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:155 puts at least two concrete past incidents or money facts on the page and Lena's rebuttal answers those specifics; FAIL if June still makes the scene land mainly through generalized claims about what 'people' do.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift hits the chapter's pivotal resentment scene. June's grievance arrives as polished social thesis ('people called it a hard time,' 'people ask if you've eaten') instead of the humiliatingly concrete money/shame evidence this confrontation needs, so the scene abstracts the class wound right where the constitution and risk policy call for sharper bills-and-bodies specificity. That same abstraction also smooths June away from her style-bible pressure voice, which should get quieter, tidier, and more fact-weaponized under strain.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the confrontation beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:129 and running through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:155. Replace at least two generalized claims with concrete remembered incidents or money consequences June would actually weaponize here: a specific missed payment, a landlord or school-office humiliation, a family reaction to Lena's divorce/return, or another stored grievance tied to who got translated and who got judged. Keep June selective and dangerous rather than turning the passage into a broader speech.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised note at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:279 contains no more than one direct lexical lift from June's earlier lines and Lena can still plausibly hear June inside it by snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:287 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:289; FAIL if the beat still depends on multiple identical callbacks in a single nineteen-second note.
findings.problem: The chapter's final contamination beat is slightly overdetermined. Eli's note repeats so many chapter-local specifics at once ('tomato on white,' 'too much pepper,' 'ugly useful stuff,' 'the opener,' 'the old towels') that the ending starts to read like clue delivery rather than the more elegant almost-proof the scene wants.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten the voice note at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:279 and the interpretive beat at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:287 through snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:289. Let Eli echo one unmistakable phrase or one trailer-specific habit, then let Lena's dread come from timing, tone, and the rerouted feel of June inside the note rather than from a pileup of matching props.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the embarrassing specifics: transfer amounts, body awkwardness, neighborhood petty detail, ugly motives, and the unstable overlap between care and control. When a choice arises between a safer generalized line and a sharper socially revealing one, choose the sharper line unless it breaks character truth.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches sex, money shame, betrayal, or bodily disgust and the prose flinches into summary or tasteful fog, revise toward concrete action, sensory residue, and social consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are normal in almost all spoken English here; full forms are reserved for emphasis, class performance, or moments of deliberate control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressed one-scene chapters with socially dense multi-scene chapters; follow hot chapters with quiet domestic ones, let comic humiliation sit beside grief, and vary dialogue density so no two consecutive chapters share the same pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary, unsanitized, class-attentive English with enough lyric lift to surprise but not enough polish to float above the bodies and bills in the room.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: tight third person centered on Lena, with no head-hopping; June and Eli are knowable only through what Lena hears, sees, infers, and later uncovers in artifacts.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, pressure-sensitive sentences that can hold embarrassment and desire in the same line, then snap short at moments of exposure or financial pain.
